title: catalpa ovata var. purpurea
intro: Catalpa ovata var. purpurea, also known as the Purple-leaf Catalpa, is a deciduous tree species native to China, characterized by its purple-leafed foliage and showy white flowers. The medicinal properties of Catalpa ovata var. purpurea lie in its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce coughs, relieve chest congestion, and even lower blood pressure. Catalpa ovata var. purpurea can be prepared into herbal teas, decoctions, and infusions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine as a dried root or in the form of a tincture.
